headline: Camp Dream GA is carried by leaders, volunteers, board support, and a wider community that keeps showing up
subheadline: The public story of camp is bigger than a single title. The organization depends on leadership, returning volunteers, medical support, families, donors, and partners who share responsibility for the mission.

sections.title: Leadership and direction
sections.description: Staff and board leadership help guide the mission, protect the culture of camp, and organize the work required each season.

sections.title: Volunteer leadership
sections.description: Experienced counselors, medical volunteers, and returning supporters create continuity from year to year and help shape the community new families meet.

sections.title: Families and partners
sections.description: The wider team includes families, churches, donors, and community partners who help sustain the ministry beyond the summer sessions.

faq.question: Why keep the team page broad instead of listing every person?
faq.answer: Because this demo is meant to reflect the real structure of the organization without pretending to be the official source of record.

cta.heading: Volunteer, donate, or contact the team if you want to become part of what keeps Camp Dream GA moving forward.
cta.body: The strongest public experience makes those action paths easy to understand while still honoring the community feel of the original organization.
